scripts.dev: concurrently -n portal,erp,crm -c auto "npm -w apps/portal run dev" "npm -w apps/erp run dev" "npm -w apps/crm run dev"
scripts.build: npm -w apps/portal run build && npm -w apps/erp run build && npm -w apps/crm run build
scripts.lint: npm -w apps/portal run lint && npm -w apps/erp run lint && npm -w apps/crm run lint
